title: Bowen: Iran deal ends Trump's war that revealed limit of US dominance
summary_full: The deal to end fighting and re-open the Strait of Hormuz leaves the sides where they were 24 hours before the war - only with thousands now dead.
summary_public: The deal to end fighting and re-open the Strait of Hormuz leaves the sides where they were 24 hours before the war - only with thousands now dead.

IR.label: negative
IR.evidence: Iran deal ends Trump's war that revealed limit of US dominance
